\tzpentry{ID5774}{Holonomy Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5774 introduces Holonomy Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \oint_{S^{1}} \mathbf{k}\cdot d\mathbf{l} = 2\pi n \quad\Rightarrow\quad n\lambda = 2\pi R_\oplus. \]
